name: Sunshine Metals Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.0305. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.0303 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.0305, stop A$0.0257, target A$0.0330. Risk/reward is 0.52:1.
